transit.note: Distances are straight-line miles from the building to the nearest entrance of each station; walk_min ≈ 20 min/mi.

ecb.description: AT THE TIME OF MY INSPECTION OF A 4 STORY NEW BUILDING EXCAVATION WORK IN PROGRESS 4 WORKERS ON SITE, I OBSERVED AT EXPOSURE #3 EXCAVATION WAS DOWN APPROXIMATELY 8 FEET AND THERE WERE NO SUPPORT OF EXCAVATION,

FAILURE TO PERFORM CONCRETE WASHOUT PROCEDURES AND COLLECTION AND CONTAINMENT:AS NOTED AT TIME OF MY INSPECTION OBSERVED CONCRETE TRUCK WASHING OFF WITHOUT A WASHOUT BOX ON THE SITE,THIS ON BEING DONE ON THE ST
